channel.title: Peter Educate's Sports Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Peter Educate's Sports Blog

item.title: What can NBA teams do to increase their fan attendance at games?
item.description: html { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Helvetica Neue', 'Fira Sans', 'Droid Sans', Arial, sans-serif; } #hnpvegvege .gt_table { display: table; border-collapse: collapse; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; color: #333333; font-size: 16px; font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; background-color: #FFFFFF; width: auto; border-top-style: solid; border-top-width: 2px; border-top-color: #A8A8A8; border-right-style: none; border-right-width: 2px; border-right-color: #D3D3D3; border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 2px; border-bottom-color: #A8A8A8; border-left-style: none; border-left-width: 2px; border-left-color: #D3D3D3; } #hnpvegvege .

item.title: Does quarterback talent affect their local fans' interest in the team?
item.description: Did you watch the Bills vs. Chiefs Divisional Round playoff game in January? It’s ok if you didn’t, more than 51 million people might be able to clue you in. Yes you read that correctly, CBS hosted one of the biggest events in the last 5 years for a typical NFL playoff weekend. The game was a back and forth tug-of-war that left jaws on the floor as the Chiefs pulled away with a sudden death touchdown.

m— author: Peter Educate date: “2022-03-24” title: About Welcome to my page! My name is Peter Educate and I am a Junior at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln. I was born in Dallas, TX but was raised in Kansas City for most of my life. I am majoring in Sociology with a minor in Statistics. Since my arrival, I have grown as a person and a student. I hope to graduate in May of 2023 with hopefully an occupation in research waiting for me.
